title: orchis longicruris subsp. bivonae
intro: Orchis longicruris subsp. bivonae, also known as the Sicilian Orchid, is a subspecies of the Orchis longicruris plant, a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orchis longicruris subsp. bivonae include treating urinary tract infections, reducing inflammation, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
